footer.description: Spanish travel planning platform. Personalized itineraries, verified activities and centralized booking in a single tool.
footer.affiliates: * Visitalo.es may earn commissions from bookings made through affiliate links. This does not affect the price you pay and helps us keep the service free.

hero.subtitle: Your next trip, planned in seconds. No forums, no spreadsheets, no drama. Just pack your bag.

item1.title: Kiss FOMO goodbye in seconds.
item1.text: Forget burning three nights between tabs, forums and spreadsheets. Your route is ready before your coffee is cold.

item2.title: Routes with zero blind spots.
item2.text: We mix viral spots with the corners only locals know. You hit the must-sees and still find what almost nobody spots.

item3.title: Your trip, your vibe.
item3.text: Slow brunch or non-stop sightseeing? Chill beach or museums till closing? We build it exactly for you — no tourist clichés.

plus.description: Boutique hotels you won't find on the usual sites. Magical country houses. Restaurants with soul. Secret activities. All the good stuff, just for those who travel seriously.
plus.bullet2: Curated activities nobody else will show you
plus.bullet4: No ads. No noise. Just your trip.
plus.paymentSoonDescription: We're finalizing the checkout. We'll let you know the moment it's ready.
plus.paymentError: Couldn't start the payment. Please try again.
plus.welcomeDescription: Your subscription is active. Enjoy God Mode.
plus.paymentCancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again whenever you want.
plus.paymentExpired: The payment session expired. Please try again.
plus.paymentUnverified: We couldn't verify the payment. If you were charged, contact info@visitalo.es.

activities.description: Book amazing activities straight from your itinerary. No jumping between 15 websites, no inflated prices, no fine print. All in one scroll.

welcomePromo.description: Sign up for Visítalo and unlock 5 tailored trips at no cost: unique stays, curated experiences and every detail designed for you.

cookies.title: We use cookies to improve your experience
cookies.description: We use our own and third-party cookies for the correct functioning of the site, to analyze traffic and to show you personalized travel recommendations. You can accept all or configure your preferences.
cookies.catNecessaryDesc: Essential for the site to work (user session, basic preferences, security). Cannot be disabled.
cookies.catAnalyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the site with analytics tools to improve the service. Data is anonymous.
cookies.catMarketingDesc: Used to show you relevant destinations and offers, and to track bookings through our accommodation and activity partners.

examples.subtitle: Three quick examples so you get the vibe: from an express weekend to a whole month across Asia. You just grab the backpack.

days.label: Day 1
days.plan: Sagrada Familia + stroll through Gràcia + dinner at a proper non-touristy spot

days.label: Day 2
days.plan: Beach in the morning + vermouth in El Born + sunset at Búnkers

days.label: Day 1
days.plan: Colosseum + getting lost in the city center + dinner in Trastevere

days.label: Day 2
days.plan: Vatican + an aimless walk through Rome + gelato at sunset

days.label: Day 3
days.plan: Charming cafés + viewpoints + one last unhurried walk

days.label: Days 1-5
days.plan: Tokyo: Shibuya, Shinjuku, street food and first impressions

days.label: Days 6-12
days.plan: Kyoto: temples, traditional streets, a day in Nara and a Fuji side trip

days.label: Days 13-15
days.plan: Osaka: eat well, atmosphere and unhurried nights

days.label: Days 16-20
days.plan: Back to Tokyo: off-the-grid neighborhoods, tiny shops and corners you find yourself

r1.quote: I knew I wanted to go to Bangkok, I just had no idea how to split the days. Got it done in no time and everything fit.
r1.author: Carlos M., 26

r2.quote: I always end up wasting hours planning trips. Here it was done in a moment and it actually made sense.
r2.author: Lucía G., 24

r3.quote: I wasn't expecting much and honestly it surprised me. Not the usual generic plans — everything felt pretty well thought out.
r3.author: Javier R., 28
